image_base=0x140000000
entry=0x140001000
func_stack=0x140001030
func_nr=0x140001050
func_a=0x140001070
func_b=0x140001090
aif_orphan=0x140001018
png_va=0x140002050
addr_table=0x140002070
rsrc_va=0x140002090
pdb_va=0x1400020a8
api_exit=0x140002000
api_printf=0x140002010
api_cookie=0x140002018
mangled=0x140002030
